---

## 🚀 Deploy on Render (Free Tier)

1. Fork / clone this repo
2. Go to [render.com](https://render.com) → New → Web Service → connect your repo
3. Set all required environment variables (see `render.yml`)
4. Deploy!

**Keep-alive (prevents 15-min sleep):**
Point [UptimeRobot](https://uptimerobot.com) → `https://<your-app>.onrender.com/health` every 5 min.

---

## ⚙️ Required Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `TOKEN` | Bot token from [@BotFather](https://t.me/BotFather) |
| `API_ID` | From [my.telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org) |
| `API_HASH` | From [my.telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org) |
| `OWNER_ID` | Your Telegram user ID |
| `DATABASE_URL` | PostgreSQL connection string |
| `MONGO_DB_URI` | MongoDB connection string (optional) |
